title: urachne obtusa
intro: Urachne obtusa, also known as the Needle Grass or Needle Bush, is a type of flowering plant native to Africa and parts of Asia. It is a shrub-like plant with needle-like leaves and small white or yellow flowers, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Urachne obtusa can be made into teas, infusions, or dried for later use, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
